en: Now concerning the collection for the saints: as I directed the churches of Galatia, so you also are to do.
zh: 關於捐獻給聖徒的事，從前我怎樣吩咐加拉太的眾教會，你們也要照著去行。

en: On the first day of every week, each of you is to put something aside and store it up, as he may prosper, so that there will be no collecting when I come.
zh: 每逢七日的第一日，你們各人要按著自己的收入抽一些出來留著，免得我來的時候才現湊。

en: And when I arrive, I will send those whom you accredit by letter to carry your gift to Jerusalem.
zh: 我來到之後，你們選中了甚麼人，我就派他們帶著書信，把你們的捐款送到耶路撒冷去。

en: If it seems advisable that I should go also, they will accompany me.
zh: 如果我也應該去，他們就可以和我一同去。

en: I will visit you after passing through Macedonia, for I intend to pass through Macedonia,
zh: 我現在正要路過馬其頓。過了馬其頓，我就會到你們那裡去。

en: and perhaps I will stay with you or even spend the winter, so that you may help me on my journey, wherever I go.
zh: 我也許會和你們同住一些時候，甚至和你們一同過冬；這樣，我無論要到哪裡去，你們都可以給我送行。

en: For I do not want to see you now just in passing. I hope to spend some time with you, if the Lord permits.
zh: 我不願意只是順路見見你們，主若許可，我盼望和你們同住一個時期。

en: But I will stay in Ephesus until Pentecost,
zh: 不過我要在以弗所住到五旬節，

en: for a wide door for effective work has opened to me, and there are many adversaries.
zh: 因為這裡有又寬大又有果效的門為我開了，同時反對的人也很多。

en: When Timothy comes, see that you put him at ease among you, for he is doing the work of the Lord, as I am.
zh: 如果提摩太來了，你們務要使他在你們那裡不會懼怕，因為他像我一樣是作主的工作的。

en: So let no one despise and the speaker a foreigner to me, that he may return to me, for I am expecting him with the brothers.
zh: 所以，誰也不要小看他。你們要送他平平安安地前行，使他到我這裡來，因為我正在等著他和弟兄們一同來。

en: Now concerning our brother Apollos, I strongly urged him to visit you with the other brothers, but it was not at all his will to come now. He will come when he has opportunity.
zh: 至於亞波羅弟兄，我曾再三勸他要和弟兄們一同到你們那裡去；但他不願意現在就去，機會到了，他是會去的。

en: Be watchful, stand firm in the faith, act like men, be strong.
zh: 你們要警醒，要在信仰上站立得穩，要作大丈夫，要剛強。

en: Let all that you do be done in love.
zh: 你們所作的一切，都要憑愛心去作。

en: Now I urge you, brothers- you know that the household of Stephanas were the first converts in Achaia, and that they have devoted themselves to the service of the saints-
zh: 弟兄們，你們知道司提反一家人是亞該亞初結的果子，他們專心地服事聖徒。

en: be subject to such as these, and to every fellow worker and laborer.
zh: 我勸你們要順服這樣的人，和所有與他們一同工作一同勞苦的人。

en: I rejoice at the coming of Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus, because they have made up for your absence,
zh: 司提反、福徒拿都和亞該古都來了，所以我很快樂，因為他們補上了你們的不足，

en: for they refreshed my spirit as well as yours. Give recognition to such men.
zh: 使我和你們的心都得著暢快。這樣的人你們要敬重他們。

en: The churches of Asia send you greetings. Aquila and Prisca, together with the church in their house, send you hearty greetings in the Lord.
zh: 亞西亞的眾教會都問候你們。亞居拉和百基拉，以及他們家裡的教會在主裡再三問候你們。

en: All the brothers send you greetings. Greet one another with a holy kiss.
zh: 所有的弟兄都問候你們。你們要用聖潔的親吻彼此問安。

en: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand.
zh: 我保羅親筆問候你們。

en: If anyone has no love for the Lord, let him be accursed. Our Lord, come!
zh: 如果有人不愛主，他就該受咒詛。主啊，願你來！

en: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with you.
zh: 願主耶穌基督的恩惠與你們同在。

en: My love be with you all in Christ Jesus. Amen.
zh: 我的愛在基督耶穌裡也與你們同在。
